#  Search Commitments (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Commitments tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * The keyword search will look for commitments with a matching title or number.
  * This item can be viewed or edited offline if it was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create a Purchase Order (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-ios/tutorials/create-a-purchase-order-ios) or [Create a Subcontract](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/create-a-subcontract)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Commitments** tool using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Enter your keyword(s) into the **Search** bar.  
![Commitments Ios Search Commitments](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/637feb28862939950385876a0d6c03ab/9fe81fc01ec1c608c57412b5a754a248/commitments-ios-search-commitments.png?fm=webp)  
_Note:_ Results with a matching commitment title or number will appear below the Search bar.


## See Also
  * [View Purchase Orders and Subcontracts (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-ios/tutorials/view-purchase-orders-and-subcontracts-ios)
  * [View Change Orders (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-ios/tutorials/view-change-orders-ios)
  * [Edit a Commitment's Schedule of Values (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-ios/tutorials/edit-a-commitments-schedule-of-values-ios)
title: Search Commitments (iOS)
description: How to search for purchase orders and subcontracts using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
